---
title: Send a link to close an account
audience:
  - ops
related:
  - /accounts/concepts/closure
  - /accounts/guides/closure/get-closure-info
---

# Send a link to close an account

Send the account's <Term id="legal-representative">legal representative</Term> a Dashboard link so they can complete account closure themselves.

If the account's [legal representative](/get-started/set-up-swan/glossary#legal-representative) requests account closure, send them a link to complete the process.

:::caution Suspended accounts
Only Swan can act on `Suspended` accounts.
If the [status](/accounts/concepts/account/statuses) is `Suspended`, you can't send a link to close the account.
:::

## Step 1: Send link to legal representative {#send-link}

1. Go to your **Dashboard** > **Data** > **Accounts**.
1. Locate the account closure link in the **Close account** tile.
1. **Click-to-copy** the link.
1. Send the link to the account's legal representative.

:::note Tracking closure
Keep track of the account closure process on **Dashboard** > **Data** > **Accounts**.
Consider subscribing to the `Account.Closing` and `Account.Closed` [webhooks](/build/using-api/webhooks#events-accounts) to be notified when the [account status](/accounts/concepts/account/statuses) changes.
:::

## Step 2: Legal representative completes process {#complete-process}

The account's legal representative opens the link you provide, then logs into their banking app.
They choose a reason for account closure, then consent to closing the account with [Strong Customer Authentication](/topics/users/consent/#sca).

To complete the account closure process, the balance must be zero.
The following table explains the actions required to reach a zero balance.

| Balance | Action |
| --- | --- |
| ➕ Positive | Transfer the funds **out of** the account with a SEPA Credit Transfer. |
| ➖ Negative | Swan works with your end users to reach a zero balance. |

:::tip Timeline
After consenting to account closure and reaching a zero balance, the account is closed **within 30 days**.
:::

## Close with the API {#api}

If the account's [legal representative](/get-started/set-up-swan/glossary#legal-representative) requests account closure, start the process **with the API**.

:::caution Suspended accounts
Only Swan can act on `Suspended` accounts.
If the [status](/accounts/concepts/account/statuses) is `Suspended`, you can't use the API to close the account.
:::

### Guide

1. Call the `closeAccount` mutation with the legal representative's [user access token](/build/using-api/authentication#tokens-user).
1. The API returns a `consentUrl`.
1. Send the `consentUrl` to the account's legal representative so they can complete [Strong Customer Authentication](/topics/users/consent/#sca).
1. As soon as the legal representative consents, the account status changes to `Closing`.

:::note Account statuses
Refer to the [account statuses](/accounts/concepts/account/statuses) section for an overview of what happens while an account is `Closing`.
:::

### Mutation

<a href="https://explorer.swan.io?%3D&tab=api" className="explorer-badge">Open in API Explorer</a>

```graphql title="Mutation" {4-6,12} showLineNumbers
mutation closeAccount {
  closeAccount(
    input: {
      accountId: "$YOUR_ACCOUNT_ID"
      reason: { type: ClosingRequested }
      consentRedirectUrl: "$YOUR_REDIRECT_URL"
    }
  ) {
    ... on CloseAccountSuccessPayload {
      __typename
      consent {
        consentUrl
      }
    }
  }
}

```

### Payload

```graphql title="Payload" {6} showLineNumbers
{
  "data": {
    "closeAccount": {
      "__typename": "CloseAccountSuccessPayload",
      "consent": {
        "consentUrl": "https://identity.swan.io/consent?consentId=$YOUR_CONSENT_ID&env=Sandbox"
      }
    }
  }
}
```
